---
title: "Advanced `git`"
subtitle: "Block 3.2: git-bug"
---

## `git-bug` 🐛

[`git-bug`](https://github.com/git-bug/git-bug) is a **distributed, offline-first bug tracker** embedded directly in your `git` repository.

- Bugs are stored as `git` objects (not commits) alongside your code
- Works completely **offline** ✈️ — no central server required
- Pushed & pulled together with your repository
- Bridges to sync with GitHub Issues, GitLab, Jira, ...
- Multiple interfaces: CLI, terminal UI, web UI

## *End of Block* 🎉 {background-color="black" background-opacity="0.2" background-image="images/backgrounds/kaiser.jpg"}

:::{.r-fit-text}
Any Questions?
:::

[[🏡 Back to Overview]](./index.html)

[[⏩️ Next Block]](./4.1-advanced-features.html)
